title: Molli and Antonella make the 2018 Junior Alberta Team
excerpt: Congratulations to Molli Hay and Antonella Rodriguez who made the Alberta 2018-19 Girls U17 and Girls U13 teams respectively. We’ll keep everyone updated on how things go for them next year. The full team announcement can be found on the Squash Alberta page.
content:
Congratulations to Molli Hay and Antonella Rodriguez who made the Alberta 2018-19 Girls U17 and Girls U13 teams respectively. We’ll keep everyone updated on how things go for them next year.

The full team announcement can be found on the Squash Alberta page.
